title: Mini-notation basics
summary: The building blocks of Strudel patterns: events, rests, groups, repetition, and alternation.

title: Sounds and samples
summary: Pick sounds by name, switch drum machines with .bank(), and use soundfont instruments with note().

title: Effects and filters
summary: Shape your sound with low-pass filters, reverb, delay, distortion, and envelope controls.

title: Pattern combinators
summary: Layer patterns with $: labels, combine with stack() and cat(), and explore structural tools.

title: Notes, scales, and chords
summary: Work with pitched content: note names, scale patterns, chord voicings, and the .voicing() method.

title: Time and tempo
summary: Control speed with setcpm, transform time with .fast() and .slow(), and use .every() for periodic variation.

title: Layering and structure
summary: Build full arrangements with $: labels, use .mask() for breakdowns, and layer textures with .off() and .jux().
code:
setcpm(120/4)

// Use $: labels for separate layers — mute/solo friendly:
drum: s("bd*2, ~ sd:1, hh*8")
  .bank("RolandTR909").gain(0.8)

// .mask() creates breakdowns by silencing on some cycles:
bass: note("c2 c2 eb2 g2").s("sawtooth")
  .lpf(600).decay(0.15).sustain(0)
  .mask("<1 1 1 0>")

// .jux() splits stereo: left plays original, right plays transformed:
lead: note("c4 eb4 g4 bb4").s("triangle")
  .jux(rev)
  .room(0.4).delay(0.3)

// .off() overlays a delayed, modified copy:
pad: note("<c3 eb3 g3 bb3>").s("gm_pad_warm")
  .off(1/8, x => x.add(7))
  .room(0.6).gain(0.4)

title: Chord progressions (strasbeat)
summary: Use strasbeat's progression() helper for one-line chord progressions with rhythm presets, styles, and bass layers.
code:
setcpm(110/4)

// progression() is a strasbeat extension — use SINGLE QUOTES:
$: progression('Cm7 F7 Bb^7 Eb^7')
  .room(0.3).gain(0.5)

// rhythm presets: block, strum, comp, arp-up, arp-down, alberti
$: progression('Cm7 F7 Bb^7 Eb^7', { rhythm: 'arp-up' })
  .delay(0.3).delaytime(0.375).gain(0.35)

// bass: true adds a root-note bass layer:
$: progression('Am7 Dm7 G7 Cmaj7', { rhythm: 'comp', bass: true })
  .gain(0.5)

// Style presets bundle sound + rhythm + FX:
$: progression('Dm7 G7 Cmaj7 Fmaj7', { style: 'jazz-comp' })
  .gain(0.5)

drum: s("bd*2, ~ sd:1, hh*8")
  .bank("RolandTR909").gain(0.6)
